sections.paragraph:
-

(1) to yield, to give way, Num 14:44 Jos 1:8 Isa 22:25 54:10 59:21 Jer 31:36.

(2) causat. to remove, to take away, Zec 3:9.

Hiphil-

(1) to let remove, i.e. to let prey go, Nah 3:1 to withdraw from any one, followed by מִן of persons. Mic 2:3, “from whom ye shall not remove your necks;” verse Mic 2:4.

(2) more frequently i.q. Kal to give way, Exo 13:22 33:11 Pro 17:13 Job 23:12 Psa 55:12 Jer 17:8, וְלֹא יָמִישׁ מֵעֲשֹׂות פֶּרִי “and it shall not cease to bear fruit.”

II.

מוש

i.q. מָשַׁשׁ and יָמַשׁ to feel, to touch, Gen 27:21.

Hiphil, id. Psa 115:7, and Jud. 16:26 קרי.

Derivative, pr.n. מוּשִׁי.
